name: Upgrade invoice preview rejects malformed input
description: Tests POST /api/entitlement/subscriptions/:subscriptionId/upgrade-invoice with invalid subscription IDs

steps.name: REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil
